title: The Global Landscape of Nursing and Genomics.
author: Calzone KA Kirk M Tonkin E Badzek L Benjamin C Middleton A
content: S-EPMC5959047 PMC5959047 The Global Landscape of Nursing and Genomics. PURPOSE:Nurses have a pivotal role in bringing the benefits of genomics and precision medicine to everyday health care, but a concerted global effort is needed to transform nursing policy and practice to address widely
